narrative:
Jackson 10 (precinct in Stark County) has 919 registered voters, with 59.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.4%, a narrow Republican lean of 1.6 percentage points.
